subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Merciful! Contrary winds have encircled the Candle of the Covenant, and the birds of pride have beset the nightingale of the rose-garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن بادهای مخالف شمع پیمان را احاطه کرده و طیور غرور عندلیب گلشن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
